news.title: FDA extends Beren’s rare disease review after info request, further stretching saga
news.snippet: The FDA has delayed its approval decision on Beren Therapeutics’ rare disease drug candidate, extending the asset’s long path toward the U.S. market.

news.title: Icon ends internal accounting investigation, finds it overstated revenue in prior years
news.snippet: Irish CRO Icon has concluded its investigation into its accounting practices and restated its consolidated financials for 2023 and 2024.

news.title: Hoth Therapeutics’ pivot to AI in space sees stock rocket after rebrand
news.snippet: Hoth Therapeutics’ search for salvation in the stars appears to have been rewarded by investors, as the company’s stock doubled after a pivot to powering AI in space.

news.title: Human Longevity launches newco, teams with Insilico for AI-powered longevity research
news.snippet: Human Longevity, which is seeking to use biology and genomics to boost the human lifespan, has launched a new company called Human Life Foundation Models (HLFM) to help with its goal.

news.title: Novartis ‘always looking’ for further ways to shuttle drugs to brain despite run of recent deals
news.snippet: Novartis may be launching an array of vehicles to shuttle drugs across the blood-brain barrier, but executives told Fierce the Swiss pharma is “always looking” for new ways to traverse this final fron

news.title: GSK’s hepatitis B drug cures one-fifth of patients in ‘major step’ for pervasive disease
news.snippet: GSK is pulling back the curtain on the phase 3 success of its chronic hepatitis B drug bepirovirsen, revealing that nearly one-fifth of all treated patients across two trials were functionally cured o

news.title: Kordata Dynamics launches with neural-focused AI clinical trial model
news.snippet: Kordata Dynamics is emerging from stealth with the aim to redefine clinical trial execution by processing neural data while taking advantage of the FDA’s recent push for real-time clinical trials.

news.title: D&D sees fibrosis improvements, MASH resolution after rolling dice on GLP-1 drug
news.snippet: D&D Pharmatech has linked its GLP-1/glucagon receptor agonist to improvements in liver health, keeping the Korean biotech in the hunt for a market already served by Novo Nordisk’s Wegovy.

news.title: Insulet issues voluntary correction for Omnipod devices in leaky insulin fault
news.snippet: Insulet has sent out a voluntary medical device correction notice for a series of its Omnipod devices amid a manufacturing fault that could lead to insulin leaking and not being fully delivered.

news.title: Apogee bags $1.3B Blackstone royalty funding deal to push eczema challenger into phase 3
news.snippet: Apogee Therapeutics has secured a promise of up to $1.3 billion in financing from Blackstone Life Sciences as the biotech gears up to take its anti-IL-13 antibody into phase 3.

news.title: Dexcom warns of stolen glucose monitors being sold by unauthorized dealers
news.snippet: Dexcom warned that some lots of its G7 wearable glucose monitors were stolen on their way to the scrapyard and were sold by a third-party vendor.

news.title: Kardigan itching for IPO to fund late-stage cardiovascular pipeline
news.snippet: Kardigan may have only launched last year, but it seems the cardiovascular-focused biotech is already eyeing the public markets.

news.title: FDA delays ruling on AstraZeneca’s breast cancer drug after negative adcomm vote
news.snippet: The FDA has delayed a decision on the approval of AstraZeneca’s camizestrant, deferring its ruling to review analyses filed after an advisory committee voted against the breast cancer prospect.

news.title: Olympus pushes deeper into oncology with $270M BioProtect deal
news.snippet: Olympus is pushing deeper into prostate cancer care with the acquisition of BioProtect, an Israeli company whose biodegradable balloon spacer has been used in more than 11,000 procedures worldwide.

news.title: As calls for COINS Act expansion grow, will new rules sweep up China biotech licensing?
news.snippet: Amid an intensifying debate over how Washington should counter China’s rapid ascent in the biotech sector, a growing chorus of policymakers and biotech insiders is urging the Treasury Department to ex

news.title: AstraZeneca gains 2nd bladder cancer nod in key expansion for Imfinzi
news.snippet: AstraZeneca has fired another shot in its bladder cancer competition with Merck’s Keytruda, with the FDA clearing its PD-L1 inhibitor Imfinzi, used alongside standard of care, to become the first immu

news.title: Pharma leaders meet with PM Takaichi in push for Japan to retain R&D edge
news.snippet: A group of over 20 global pharma leaders met with Japan's Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi to address Japan's declining share of biopharma R&D.

news.title: CVS restores coverage of Eli Lilly obesity med Zepbound, adds new pill Foundayo
news.snippet: The top pharmacy benefit manager in the U.S., CVS Caremark, will restore coverage to obesity products from Eli Lilly, allowing a significant number of patients to gain access to the drugs through thei

news.title: PharmaEssentia taps Incyte alum Eric Vogel as it eyes Besremi expansion
news.snippet: PharmaEssentia has hired Eric Vogel as its new U.S. Head of Commercialization as it seeks to broaden the label of its rare blood cancer drug Besremi to a much wider market.

news.title: With Elahere building steam, AbbVie nets FDA nod for another ImmunoGen cancer asset
news.snippet: As AbbVie continues to capitalize on its deal for ImmunoGen with the growth of commercial antibody-drug conjugate Elahere, another of the acquired company’s clinical assets has crossed the FDA finish

news.title: Kaléo speaks up on allergy awareness to amplify patient stories
news.snippet: Kaléo has launched the “AUVI-Q Speaks Up” campaign to share patients’, caregivers’ and healthcare providers’ stories about life with severe allergies.

news.title: Viridian, awaiting FDA decision, taps WuXi Bio in eye drug supply deal
news.snippet: Viridian aims to challenge Amgen in a blockbuster market, and it's now tapped Chinese CDMO giant WuXi Biologics in a manufacturing pact.

news.title: ASCO preview: With expectations jacked up, Akeso's ivonescimab to face scrutiny in high-stakes plenary
news.snippet: With honor comes scrutiny. Ivonescimab's plenary status means its Harmoni-6 results in first-line non-small cell lung cancer will be put under the microscope and critiqued carefully at the upcoming AS

news.title: As J&J separates from its orthopedics business, it's laying off 56 employees in New Jersey
news.snippet: In another round of Big Pharma layoffs in New Jersey, Johnson & Johnson is dismissing 56 employees at its corporate headquarters in New Brunswick. The layoffs are part of the company's effort to s

news.title: GLP-1 manufacturer CordenPharma strikes deal for peptide CDMO, lining up new production sites in US and China
news.snippet: Amid a nearly $1 billion GLP-1 manufacturing expansion that began in 2024, CMDO CordenPharma is doubling down on its peptide capacity ambitions.

news.title: Outlook moves toward potential US nod for thrice-snubbed eye drug with FDA appeal win
news.snippet: After a formal dispute resolution process that followed three prior rejections, the FDA has decided that Outlook's eye drug candidate Lytenava has shown evidence of effectiveness.

news.title: Amid policy and pricing headwinds, US healthcare and life sci faces 'vast field of opportunity': survey
news.snippet: As regulatory, pricing and policy dynamics whipsaw in the United States, healthcare and life sciences firms are facing enormous pressures to keep profits rising, with those challenges now “becoming mo

news.title: Biogen investigated by Italian regulator over multiple sclerosis ‘market abuse’ claims
news.snippet: Italy’s antitrust agency, the Italian Competition Authority (AGCM), is investigating Biogen and its Italian subsidiary over claims it is abusing its market position regarding a test for its multiple s

news.title: FDA delays ruling on AstraZeneca’s breast cancer drug after negative adcomm vote
news.snippet: The FDA has delayed a decision on the approval of AstraZeneca’s camizestrant, deferring its ruling to review analyses filed after an advisory committee voted against the breast cancer prospect.

news.title: Eli Lilly wins argument over Noom’s GLP-1 dosing claims
news.snippet: Eli Lilly has successfully challenged Noom’s “A Smaller Dose. A Smarter Start” claim, leading the National Advertising Division (NAD) to recommend the digital health company change or drop the stateme

news.title: STAT+: Biotech veteran Jeremy Levin on why the industry’s future is secure, but American leadership is at risk
news.snippet: Biotech is producing scientific breakthroughs that once seemed impossible. But according to longtime industry executive Jeremy Levin, the institutions that support these advances, from regulators, to

news.title: Biotech exec Jeremy Levin on the industry’s strategic turning point
news.snippet: This week on "The Readout LOUD," longtime biotech exec Jeremy Levin talks about his new book and the industry's strategic turning point. Listen now.

news.title: STAT+: Trump’s pharma deals get tested
news.snippet: We still have a lot of questions about Trump's MFN deals with pharma companies.

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a hepatitis B drug, CVS returns Lilly obesity drug to formularies, and more
news.snippet: In this morning's Pharmalittle roundup, we're reading about a hepatitis B drug, CVS returns Lilly obesity drug to formularies, and more.

news.title: STAT+: Ahead of ASCO, all eyes on pancreatic cancer
news.snippet: Strong results from GSK's hepatitis B drug, engineered heart patches, and more biotech news from The Readout

news.title: STAT+: Blood pressure tech floods the market after FDA relaxes wearables oversight
news.snippet: Wearables with unvalidated blood pressure measuring tech are flooding the market after the FDA relaxed oversight of wellness devices.

news.title: STAT+: An ASCO preview: What to watch for at cancer research’s big meeting
news.snippet: Here's what to watch for at ASCO, cancer research's big meeting, in Chicago.

news.title: STAT+: Trump’s drug-pricing deals set to be tested by new product launches
news.snippet: The public is about to get its first look at the prices of drugs launched since President Trump struck his most-favored-nation deals with 17 drugmakers.

news.title: STAT+: Experimental hepatitis B treatment was a ‘functional cure’ for nearly 1 in 5, new data show
news.snippet: An experimental GSK drug helped 1 in 5 patients with chronic hepatitis B achieve what's known as a functional cure, vastly outpacing current treatments.

news.title: Prostate cancer screening only for 'a few thousand' high risk men
news.snippet: Only men with a dangerous genetic variant and a family history of cancer should be offered screening, say UK advisors.

news.title: Ebola risk raised to 'very high' in DR Congo
news.snippet: The head of the UN health agency says the risk in the wider region is "high", but it remains "low" at the global level.

news.title: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
news.snippet: The rare species of Ebola involved - known as Bundibugyo - kills around a third of those infected and has no proven vaccine yet.

news.title: Riskiest skin cancer cases hit UK record high
news.snippet: The number of melanoma skin cancer cases has risen above 20,000 a year for the first time in the UK.
